sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7576" key="a)nasu/ntacis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνασύν-ταξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7576.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reassessment of war-tax levied on property,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:179" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.179</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
